name: Imricor Medical Systems Inc.
analysis: EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price has pulled back and is testing the 55 EMA at A$1.8306. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Trade setup: entry A$1.8306, stop A$1.5840, target A$1.8600. Risk/reward is 0.12:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
